# Requirement: FR-001

- Title: Consultant-focused hero and services narrative
- Status: Active

## Requirement Statement

The system shall present a home page with a hero section communicating consultant role, target clients (small businesses), and service focus (AI, automation, software development), plus a services section listing 3–4 core offerings with outcome-first descriptions and a primary CTA navigating to the contact page.

## Rationale

Current structure does not clearly communicate consultant identity, target client profile, or practical service outcomes for small businesses. Visitors need to understand quickly that the brand is a personal B2B consulting practice.

## Acceptance Conditions

- Home page renders a hero section that states consultant role, target clients (small businesses), and service focus (AI, automation, software development).
- Services section lists exactly 3 to 4 core offerings with outcome-first descriptions aligned to business problem solving.
- Primary CTA communicates a direct consulting next step and navigates to contact page without broken routes or anchors.
- Home page copy avoids generic agency language and uses first-person consultant positioning.

## Success Metrics

- >= 70% of home-page visitors reach projects or contact sections in analytics observations after release.

## Non-Goals

- Interactive quote workflow, pricing calculator, multi-language localization.

## Constraints

- Static-first architecture, content sourced from repository-local data, no runtime secrets.
